command: bun run --filter=@taxkit/sdk check-packed-artifact && bun run --filter=@taxkit/sdk validate:downstream
oracle: The isolated consumer installs the generated dist-only tarball rather than workspace source.
summary: The 38-file dist-only SDK tarball and packed dependency closure installed, typechecked, executed, exported, browser-bundled, and removed the temporary consumer workspace.
omittedDetail: Transient tarball and temporary-workspace paths are not retained as durable evidence.
nonClaim: The transient local tarball establishes no registry publication or external availability.
